channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: AirPods Max 2 : ce chef-d’œuvre audio noté 10/10 profite déjà d’une réduction pour les French Days
item.description: Les AirPods Max 2 font partie des très rares produits à avoir obtenu la note de 10/10. Ils la méritent amplement, surtout quand leur prix baisse à l'occasion des French Days : 549 euros au lieu de 579 euros grâce à un code promo sur Rakuten.

item.title: Pour son prochain moniteur gaming OLED, LG passerait commande à son pire ennemi
item.description: Des informations en provenance de plusieurs médias spécialisés suggèrent que LG Electronics prépare un moniteur gaming OLED et 240 Hz de 27 pouces... avec une particularité intrigante à la clé, car pour ce modèle, le géant coréen ferait une grosse infidélité à sa société sœur LG Display. On vous explique.

item.title: Adorama kicks off massive Nikon sale — including record-low prices on the Z6 III and my favorite camera from last year
item.description: Adorama has just launched a massive sale on Nikon cameras and lenses, including up to $900 off.

item.title: 'An unauthorized actor accessed certain Vimeo user and customer data': Vimeo confirms security incident, blames attack on Anodot breach
item.description: Vimeo did not say how many people were affected, but confirmed that payment data is secure.

item.title: Dreame’s robot arm obsession produced a next-gen RGB mini-LED TV with speakers that physically change their angle to follow you around your room and provide the best sound wherever you're sitting
item.description: This Dreame TV has speakers that adjust to your position to deliver perfect sound.

item.title: GTA 6 boss says marketing will begin 'soon', solidifying earlier promise
item.description: GTA 6's release date looks more solid than ever, with Take-Two Interactive's boss further suggesting marketing will kick off soon.

item.title: ‘It disappeared right in front of my eyes’: some Google Messages users are fuming after a bug erased some of their most prized chats — here’s what a Google product expert recommends doing
item.description: Google Messages users are seeing their chats disappear, and it's all because of the Samsung Messages shutdown.

item.title: Best Walking Pads for Working From Home (2026)
item.description: Our remote team clocked serious hours walking, working, and sometimes jogging to find the best under-desk treadmills for home offices and small spaces.

item.title: Electric air taxis are finally taking flight — just not with passengers
item.description: It was the perfect day for an electric air taxi demonstration - albeit one without passengers. On Monday, an electric aircraft from Joby Aviation took off from JFK Airport for a flight demonstrating the company's future air taxi route to Manhattan. The aircraft - egg-shaped cabin, six tilt-rotor propellers, electric motor - made its way […]

item.title: Saros reminded me how great the DualSense can be
item.description: The DualSense controller was one of Sony's main selling points for the PS5. Beyond things like a striking new design and adaptive triggers, the controller's haptic feedback offered genuinely cool new experiences for games. Rumble effects had been around for decades at that point, but the DualSense offered something very different: I'm still blown away […]...

item.title: Jack Dorsey-backed Vine reboot Divine launches to the public
item.description: Divine, a Vine reboot backed by Jack Dorsey’s nonprofit, revives six-second looping videos.

item.title: Yellowstone spinoff Marshals season 2 won't be losing Kayce Dutton as Luke Grimes 'signs new contract' — but Dutton Ranch and wider Western Taylor Sheridan world could also benefit
item.description: Marshals season 2 has already been confirmed, but I've got a hunch that star Luke Grimes' 'new contract' won't just be for the Yellowstone spinoff.

item.title: I tested the Nikon Z 70-200mm f/2.8 VR S II, and it's flawless — now I’m desperate to upgrade from my trusty DSLR original
item.description: The mark II version of Nikon's 70-200mm f/2.8 for Z-mount features a lighter build, new optical design and various design tweaks, and the result is a virtually flawless telephoto zoom.

item.title: Boîte de réception | Trois tendances numériques inquiétantes…
How to watch Heartbeat online — Stream viral dating show from anywhere outside Nigeria
item.description: 12 weeks of drama and dating ensue in Heartbeat, the hot new reality show coming out of Nigeria.

item.title: Meta licencie des centaines d’employés chargés d’améliorer l’IA… pour les remplacer par l’IA
item.description: Meta a annoncé le licenciement de 700 employés de Covalen, sous-traitant de Meta, lors d'une visioconférence. La majorité des personnes licenciées étaient des annotateurs contribuant à l'amélioration des systèmes d'IA pour la modération des contenus.

item.title: Your PS5 can now transform into a Linux PC
item.description: A developer has created a method to get Linux running on some versions of Sony's PlayStation 5 console. Andy Nguyen previously showed off a ported version of Ubuntu running PC games on a PS5 last month, and he's now published the installation steps on GitHub this week. This is a soft mod, so it won't […]

item.title: 12 gadgets that will turn your mini garden into the perfect spot for watching nature or entertaining — from $20
item.description: With the right tech, even the smallest outdoor space can become a haven for wildlife, or the coolest spot for dining al fresco this summer.

item.title: Smart Cat Collars: Which Is Best for Health and GPS Tracking?
item.description: I pitted Tractive and Fi Mini smart cat collars against each other to crown the best for activity, sleep, and GPS tracking.

item.title: Shein, Temu, AliExpress… 60 % des adaptateurs et chargeurs contrôlés sont dangereux, selon la Répression des fraudes
item.description: L'heure de la « mobilisation générale » : après l'affaire des poupées gonflables sur Shein, Bercy lance une nouvelle cellule de surveillance et d'action visant à réduire les cas de produits dangereux ou non conformes présents sur les plateformes de e-commerce. Selon les investigations de la Répression des fraudes menées l'année dernière sur une trentaine de sites, 75 % des produits testés se sont révélés non conformes, 46 % sont considérés comme dangereux. Pour les produits électriques, les résultats sont pires....

item.title: 'VECT is being marketed as ransomware...but it functions as a data destruction tool': Experts warn this "broken" ransomware is now acting as a data wiper, so protect your files now
item.description: New ransomware variant destroys everything bigger than 128kb, making retrieval without a backup impossible.

item.title: Des Tatooine par milliards ? Ce que les astronomes viennent de découvrir bouscule les modèles
item.description: Deux soleils à l’horizon, comme sur Tatooine… et peut-être aussi davantage de planètes dans leur voisinage. Longtemps considérés comme des environnements chaotiques peu propices à la formation de mondes, les systèmes d’étoiles binaires pourraient au contraire être de véritables usines à...

item.title: 13 Best Coolers for Sunshine and Nighttime (2026)
item.description: We tested coolers on camping trips, road trips, beach days, and at parties to bring you our favorite models for every situation. The Yeti Tundra Haul is our top pick.

item.title: Fuite des données de 11 millions de Français : la France va faire « de nouvelles annonces »
item.description: Plus de 11 millions de Français ont vu leurs données d’identité exposées. La France promet un plan de riposte d’urgence avec de « nouvelles annonces » dans la journée du jeudi 30 avril.

item.title: Adidas Adizero Adios Pro Evo 3 Shoe Review: World Record Breaker
item.description: I ran in Sabastian Sawe’s world-record-breaking running shoe. It’s fast, but only if you can maintain your locked-in form for 26 miles.

item.title: Your Phone Notifications Reveal More Than You Realize. Here’s How to Lock Them Down
item.description: A recent case shows law enforcement can see incoming Signal messages by searching an iPhone, even after the Signal app has been deleted. Here’s what to know, and how to protect yourself.

item.title: A key weapon in America’s ‘Golden Dome’ defense shield is taking shape
item.description: The Army-Navy effort aims to produce a containerized 150 kilowatt high-energy laser weapon to counter incoming cruise missiles. This article is republished with permission from Laser Wars, a newsletter about military laser weapons and other futuristic defense technology.

item.title: Vie numérique | Comment vous sevrer du doomscrolling et des écrans
item.description: L’expression « défilement anxiogène » ne rend pas justice à son équivalent anglophone, doomscrolling. Faire défiler le contenu à l’écran de votre mobile jusqu’à causer votre perte. Une perte de contrôle addictive, en particulier chez les jeunes. Voici trois façons de reprendre le contrôle.

item.title: ‘Your phone is about to stop being yours': anger brewing among Android fans as major Google app change draws near
item.description: Android is about to become less open, and users aren't happy.

item.title: Meta isn’t doing enough to keep kids off Facebook and Instagram, rules EU
item.description: Meta is breaching Europe's Digital Services Act (DSA) rules by failing to prevent children under 13 from using Facebook and Instagram, according to a preliminary decision issued by the European Commission. The Commission announced the ruling on Wednesday after an almost two-year investigation, saying that Meta doesn't have adequate measures in place to stop under-13s […]...

item.title: Why insurance innovation ambitions keep stalling
item.description: The gap between firms modernizing their back offices and those still running on fragmented systems and manual workflows.

item.title: China freezes new robotaxi licenses after Baidu chaos
item.description: China has suspended new licenses for autonomous vehicles, Bloomberg reports, citing unnamed people familiar with the matter. The move comes after dozens of robotaxis operated by Chinese tech giant Baidu ground to a halt in traffic last month in Wuhan, creating chaos. The restrictions will prevent companies from adding new driverless cars to their fleets, […]...

item.title: We obtained nearly 1,000 complaints about SpaceX’s Starlink. Here’s what they reveal
item.description: New documents show how the satellite provider has become a lifeline—and, for some customers, a headache. More than 900 complaints that mention SpaceX or its Starlink internet service have been filed with the Federal Communications Commission over the past five years, according to files obtained through a public records request.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel has a brutal response to Rudy Giuliani calling him distasteful and incompetent
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel has responded directly to footage of Rudy Giuliani calling him an "incompetent jackass".

item.title: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna on his first job and the lessons he learned from it
item.description: ‘You can’t win with technology alone. You also need a deep understanding of the market.’ I joined IBM Research in the early 1990s wanting to be a networking specialist. I spent time in grad school at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (UIUC) working on algebraic coding theory—specifically cyclic codes—for my master’s thesis. Cyclic codes are mathematical patterns that prevent signals from interfering with each other. Think of them as a way to let hundreds of conversations happen in the same room without anyone talking over each other. At the time, I thought that knowledge might nev...

item.title: Bonne nouvelle en Europe : le FSD arrivera sur les « vieilles » Tesla (mais avec une subtilité)
item.description: Bonne nouvelle pour des millions de Tesla en Europe : le FSD, la fonction la plus révolutionnaire de la marque, sera bien compatibles avec les Tesla produites entre 2019 et 2023.

item.title: The AI illusion: Why businesses are spending big but fixing nothing
item.description: Businesses pour money into AI, but broken systems prevent real results and ROI

item.title: Google’s new Pentagon deal widens AI’s role in war to 'any lawful government purpose'
item.description: Google’s reported Pentagon AI deal underscores a broader industry shift toward military partnerships that could shape advanced AI

item.title: Which Automatic Litter Box Is Best? We Tested Litter-Robot’s Lineup
item.description: Whisker’s Litter-Robot name has become synonymous with the automatic litter box. We’ve tested the entire lineup and can help you choose the best model for your household.

item.title: The Justice Department Has Destroyed Its Voting Rights Section
item.description: There were around 30 attorneys in the DOJ’s Voting Section on the day of Donald Trump’s second inauguration. Three months later, all but two were gone. Now the election deniers are in control.

item.title: Boulanger lance une grande braderie pour le début des French Days
item.description: La première édition des French Days 2026 vient de débuter, et quel démarrage ! On trouve de nombreux produits Tech à prix cassés, notamment chez Boulanger. Retrouvez ici celles que nous avons retenues.

item.title: 'Watching, keeping tabs, and sharing': New report claims workplace apps gathering far more personal data than we all think — and its even being used for advertising
item.description: Your personal data is being collected by your workplace app, and sometimes passed on to advertisers
